name: Nail Studio
tagline: Polished sets, modern nail art, and luxe care

hero.headline: Modern nail design
hero.subheadline: Sculpted shapes, rich colours, and wellness-first care.

about.headline: About Nail Studio
about.body: Nail Studio is a soft-glow space for hands that carry your story. We shape, strengthen, and elevate your nails with care that fits your pace and your style � whether you want a quiet classic or a pop of art. Every appointment is designed to feel unhurried, thoughtful, and uniquely yours.

highlights.title: Art direction
highlights.body: Trend-led designs with bespoke colour palettes, tailored to your style and the shape that flatters your hands.

highlights.title: Nail health
highlights.body: Strengthening rituals and cuticle care that protect, nourish, and keep your nails resilient between visits.

highlights.title: Express glow
highlights.body: Efficient services for busy schedules, delivering a polished finish without sacrificing detail or care.

services.headline: Nail services
services.body: Choose your finish, shape, and signature art.

relatedConsultants.headline: Available nail artists
relatedConsultants.body: Book a nail artist who performs this service.
relatedConsultants.emptyMessage: Artist availability varies by date. Check back soon.

services.title: Signature Manicure
services.description: Cuticle care, shaping, and glossy polish. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R220.

details.longDescription: A signature manicure with detailed cuticle care, shaping, buffing, and high-gloss polish. Perfect for a clean, classic finish.
prepSteps: Remove gel or acrylic 24 hours before if possible.
Bring inspiration photos if you want a specific finish.
Avoid hand oils right before the appointment.
aftercareSteps: Apply cuticle oil nightly for 5 days.
Wear gloves for cleaning and hot water tasks.
Book a refresh every 2 to 3 weeks.

services.title: Gel Artist Set
services.description: Gel extensions with custom art detailing. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R550.

details.longDescription: A gel extension set with custom art detailing and durable shine. Includes shaping, layering, and a protective top coat.
prepSteps: Arrive with clean nails and no polish.
Share your preferred length and shape.
Bring reference art if you want a specific look.
aftercareSteps: Avoid hot water for 4 hours after service.
Use cuticle oil to keep the set flexible.
Schedule a fill every 2 to 3 weeks.

services.title: Spa Pedicure
services.description: Exfoliation, massage, and polish finish. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R320.

details.longDescription: A restorative pedicure with exfoliation, massage, and polish. Designed for softness, circulation, and a polished finish.
prepSteps: Wear open-toe shoes after the appointment.
Avoid shaving 24 hours before service.
Share any sensitivity or concerns with your consultant.
aftercareSteps: Moisturize feet daily for 7 days.
Avoid tight shoes for 24 hours.
Reapply top coat midweek for added shine.

services.title: Builder Gel Sculpt
services.description: Structured gel overlay with custom shape and strength. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R450.

details.longDescription: A structured builder gel overlay that adds strength and clean architecture. Ideal for durability with a natural look.
prepSteps: Arrive with natural nails free of polish.
Share your desired length and shape goals.
Avoid lotions right before service.
aftercareSteps: Avoid hard impact for 24 hours.
Use cuticle oil to prevent lifting.
Book a fill every 3 weeks.

services.title: Express Refresh
services.description: Quick clean-up, reshape, and polish change. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R180.

details.longDescription: A quick polish refresh with light prep and shaping. Perfect between full services.
prepSteps: Arrive with clean nails, no polish if possible.
Bring your preferred colour or finish reference.
Let us know if you need additional repair.
aftercareSteps: Avoid heat and water for 2 hours.
Apply cuticle oil every other day.
Refresh in 1 to 2 weeks for best results.

services.title: Soft Gel Overlay
services.description: Natural overlay for strength and clean shine. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R290.

details.longDescription: A light overlay to reinforce natural nails, improve durability, and maintain a refined, glossy finish.
prepSteps: Arrive 10 minutes early for a smooth check-in.
Share any sensitivities or preferences before treatment begins.
Avoid heavy products on the treatment area before your session.
aftercareSteps: Follow the recommended at-home care plan for best results.
Stay hydrated and avoid harsh products for 24 hours.
Book your next maintenance session based on your consultant guidance.

consultants.headline: Nail artists
consultants.body: Artists with a passion for detail and craft.

relatedServices.headline: Services by this artist
relatedServices.body: Choose a service this artist performs.

consultants.name: Mira Lopez
consultants.bio: Creates trend-forward art with precision detailing. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Mira leads the art direction for Nail Studio with a focus on precision detail, chrome finishes, and custom sets. She is known for balancing bold creativity with clean structure.

consultants.name: Hana Okafor
consultants.bio: Focuses on nail health and strengthening routines. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Hana is a nail care specialist who prioritizes nail health, strength, and recovery. She designs rituals that keep nails resilient between services.

consultants.name: Jules Martin
consultants.bio: Collaborates on colour palettes and seasonal trends. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Jules collaborates on seasonal colour stories and art direction. Their work blends trend forecasting with clean, modern design.

consultants.name: Rhea Singh
consultants.bio: Known for sculpted shapes and clean minimal finishes. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Rhea is known for sculpted shapes and minimal finishes. She specialises in durability-focused sets with refined structure.

booking.headline: Book Nail Studio
booking.body: Find your perfect set and reserve a time.

steps.title: Choose your service
steps.body: Select manicure, pedicure, or art packages.

steps.title: Select your artist
steps.body: Meet Nail Studio artists who match your style.

steps.title: Confirm details
steps.body: Receive care tips and a personalised lookbook.

widget.headline: Finalize your booking
widget.body: Select your consultant, date, and time. You'll see a confirmation instantly.
widget.confirmationBody: We will send a reminder with prep details.
widget.missingSelection: Select a date and time to confirm.
widget.emptyConsultant: No consultants available for this service.
